Thursday 4 December 2025 | Foreign Affairs, Defence and Trade Committee

2024/25 Annual review of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Trade

Hearing of evidence:
Submitter list:

Hon Todd McClay - Associate Minister of Foreign Affairs

Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Trade

Bede Corry, Chief Executive and Secretary of Foreign Affairs and Trade
Taha Macpherson, Deputy Chief Executive – Policy
Cecile Hillyer, Deputy Chief Executive – People and Operations Group
Vangelis Vitalis, Deputy Secretary Trade and Economic Group

Wayne Verhoeven, Chief Financial Officer
